entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (62) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION.
BASE AWARD: TAS CODE: TAS::91 0198::TAS SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID.
MODIFICATION: TO ISSUE A STOP WORK ORDER FOR ALL WORK UNDER CHANGE REQUEST NUMBER 2157, DUE TO THE CURRENT LAPSE IN APPROPRIATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0012 (67) awarded to GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID.
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION 0067 TO CONTRACT NUMBER ED-FSA-09-D-0012 IS TO DISTRIBUTE 15 PERSONAL IDENTITY VERIFICATION (PIV) TOKENS TO THE CONTRACTOR. TOKENS ARE BEING ISSUED AS GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY (GFP) IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT. THE SERIAL NUMBERS OF TOKENS BEING DISTRIBUTED TO THE CONTRACTOR ARE LISTED IN ATTACHMENT 1 TO ENCLOSURE 1.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.

ns1:vendor.ns1:contractorName: GREAT LAKES EDUCATIONAL LOAN SERVICES, INC.
